data.title: Light & Wonder to Acquire Grover Gaming Assets
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Light & Wonder ( (LNW) ).

On February 17, 2025, Light & Wonder, Inc. announced a definitive agreement to acquire the charitable gaming assets of Grover Gaming, Inc. and G2 Gaming, Inc. for $850 million, with a potential earn-out of up to $200 million. This acquisition, expected to close in the second quarter of 2025, positions Light & Wonder as a leader in the fast-growing charitable gaming space, enhancing its cross-platform strategy and presenting new revenue opportunities by integrating Grover’s established customer base with its land-based gaming content.

More about Light & Wonder

Light & Wonder, Inc. is a leading cross-platform global games company that creates immersive content for players across various platforms. The company prides itself on delivering unforgettable experiences, leveraging the talents of over 6,000 team members, and maintaining a commitment to integrity and sustainable practices.

YTD Price Performance: 13.66%

Average Trading Volume: 604,129

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.57B

The latest announcement is out from Dominion Water Reserves ( (TSE:PRME) ).

Groupe Prime Drink Corp. announced a strategic restructuring of its subsidiary, Triani Canada Inc., to improve the long-term viability and profitability of its bottling operations. This initiative aims to reduce operating costs, enhance cash flow positivity, and ensure sustainable growth, with Garry Turpin appointed as the executive president of Embouteillage Prime to lead this transformation.

More about Dominion Water Reserves

data.title: CRRC Corporation Announces Results of 2025 First Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from CRRC ( (HK:1766) ).

CRRC Corporation Limited announced the poll results of its 2025 first extraordinary general meeting held in Beijing, China. The meeting was attended by 4,051 shareholders and proxies, representing 56.9% of the company’s voting shares. The meeting complied with relevant laws and regulations, and resolutions were voted on through a combination of on-site and internet voting. The event signifies active shareholder engagement and adherence to corporate governance practices, impacting CRRC’s operational transparency and stakeholder confidence.

More about CRRC

CRRC Corporation Limited is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the transportation equipment manufacturing industry. The company primarily focuses on the production of rolling stock, including locomotives and rail vehicles, serving both domestic and international markets.

Inrom Const ( (IL:INRM) ) just unveiled an update.

Inrom Const announced a significant change in their securities holdings, which includes the exercise of non-tradable and non-transferable options and the allocation of trust shares as part of acquiring control in Alumlight. data.title: Northstar Teams Up with YORK1 for Sustainable Shingle Reprocessing
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Northstar Clean Technologies, Inc. ( (TSE:ROOF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. announced a non-binding letter of intent with YORK1 Environmental Waste Solutions Ltd. to form a strategic alliance for supplying waste roofing shingles to Northstar’s planned Empower Hamilton Facility in Ontario. This agreement is significant for Northstar as it ensures a consistent supply of shingles, which is crucial for their operations and growth plans. The collaboration with YORK1 is expected to enhance Northstar’s ability to create a sustainable solution for asphalt shingle reprocessing, potentially making a notable environmental impact in Southern Ontario.

More about Northstar Clean Technologies, Inc.

Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. is a Canadian clean technology company specializing in the sustainable recovery and reprocessing of asphalt shingles. Utilizing a proprietary design process, Northstar extracts liquid asphalt, aggregate, and fiber from discarded shingles, which are then reused in new asphalt manufacturing and construction products. The company is focused on leading the circular economy by addressing the issue of landfill-bound asphalt shingles across North America.

YTD Price Performance: -10.84%

Average Trading Volume: 308,074

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$48.05M

data.title: United Rentals Ends Acquisition Pursuit, Resumes Buybacks
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from United Rentals ( (URI) ) is now available.

On February 18, 2025, United Rentals announced its decision not to pursue a revised acquisition proposal for H&E Equipment Services, opting instead to allow the merger agreement to be terminated following a superior offer received by H&E. This decision underlines United Rentals’ commitment to financial discipline and its strategy to focus on profitable growth and shareholder value. Subsequently, United Rentals will resume its share repurchase program, which is a key component of its capital return strategy, with $250 million remaining from its authorized $1.5 billion program.

More about United Rentals

United Rentals, Inc. is the world’s largest equipment rental company, operating an integrated network of 1,501 rental locations across North America, 39 in Europe, 37 in Australia, and 19 in New Zealand. The company serves a diverse clientele including construction and industrial sectors, utilities, municipalities, and homeowners with approximately 5,000 classes of equipment available for rent. Headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, United Rentals is a prominent entity in several major stock indices, including the S&P 500.

YTD Price Performance: 5.48%

Average Trading Volume: 579,869

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Liongold ( (SG:A78) ) just unveiled an update.

Shen Yao Holdings Limited, a company registered in Singapore, announced that it has received a Notice of Discontinuance regarding a previous claim filed against it in the High Court. The claimant has wholly discontinued any legal action against the company, and the costs payable to the company are to be agreed upon or determined by the court. This development leaves Shen Yao Holdings free of outstanding claims, allowing it to focus on securing new investors and exploring business opportunities, despite the suspension of its share trading.

data.title: Adecoagro Receives Unsolicited Acquisition Proposal from Tether
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Adecoagro SA ( (AGRO) ).

On February 18, 2025, Adecoagro S.A. announced that it received an unsolicited non-binding proposal from Tether Investments S.A. de C.V. to acquire outstanding Common Shares through a tender offer. Tether, already a 19.4% shareholder, seeks to increase its stake to 51%. The company’s Board of Directors convened on February 16, 2025, and decided to engage legal and financial advisors to evaluate the proposal’s terms and implications for stakeholders. Shareholders are not required to take any action at this point.

More about Adecoagro SA

Adecoagro S.A. is a leading sustainable production company based in South America. It owns 210.4 thousand hectares of farmland and operates industrial facilities across productive regions in Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay. The company produces over 2.8 million tons of agricultural products and generates over 1 million MWh of renewable electricity.

YTD Price Performance: 2.30%

Average Trading Volume: 471,465

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: $1.02B
